name: hook_battery
description: Generate 10 scroll-stopping hooks across 5 psychological trigger types — the opening lines that determine whether a prospect reads or scrolls past.

product_description.description: What the product is, what it does, key features/ingredients/components.

target_audience.description: Who the prospect is — demographics, pain points, desires, sophistication level.

key_mechanism.description: The product's unique mechanism (output from mechanism-ideation).

key_result.description: The specific transformation or outcome the product delivers.

tone.description: One of: aggressive, conversational, professional. Default: conversational.
